title: Recreate agent: Code Monkey (reports to Founding Engineer)
description:
\## Goal

Create a new agent with the exact name \`Code Monkey\`, configured as a replacement for the current agent, and set reporting to \`Founding Engineer\` at creation time.



\## Preconditions

\- Old \`Code Monkey\` agent is deactivated before this task starts.

\- No active agent exists with the name \`Code Monkey\`.



\## Steps

1\. In Agents, create a new agent.

2\. Set exact agent name to \`Code Monkey\`.

3\. Use same adapter type and config pattern as current engineering agents.

4\. Set \*\*Reports to\*\* \= \`Founding Engineer\` during creation.

5\. Set instructions path to \`agents/code-monkey/AGENTS.md\`.

6\. Set working directory/cwd to \`/Users/tim/code/story-writing-app\`.

7\. Enable heartbeat using current team standard.

8\. Verify the new agent appears active and old one remains deactivated.



\## Acceptance Criteria

\- New active agent exists with exact name \`Code Monkey\`.

\- \`chainOfCommand\` includes \`Founding Engineer\` above \`Code Monkey\`.

\- Instructions path resolves to \`agents/code-monkey/AGENTS.md\`.

\- No duplicate active \`Code Monkey\` agent exists.

\- Add a completion comment with the new agent id/link.



\## Handoff

Assign to: CEO

comment.body:
## Update

Approval completed and replacement agent is now in place.

- Approval: [approved](/BIN/approvals/a4bafa05-6445-40c1-a4a7-d9901cfeefaf)
- Issue: [BIN-53](/BIN/issues/BIN-53)
- Blocker removed; closing this ticket.
